creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sbz
Date: Tue Aug 14 10:18:07 2012
New Revision: 302514
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302514

Log:
  - Update to 0.9.5
  
  PR:		ports/168894
  Submitted by:	koobs <koobs.freebsd at gmail.com>
  Approved by:	Georg Graf <georg at graf.priv.at> (maintainer)

Deleted:
  head/mail/py-milter/files/
Modified:
  head/mail/py-milter/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/mail/py-milter/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/mail/py-milter/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/mail/py-milter/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/mail/py-milter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/py-milter/Makefile	Tue Aug 14 10:09:49 2012	(r302513)
+++ head/mail/py-milter/Makefile	Tue Aug 14 10:18:07 2012	(r302514)
@@ -6,23 +6,27 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	milter
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.7
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.5
 CATEGORIES=	mail python
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/py${PORTNAME}/OldFiles \
-		http://www.bmsi.com/python/
-
+MASTER_SITES=	SOURCEFORGE
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PYPORTNAME}/${PYPORTNAME}/${DISTNAME}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+DISTNAME=	${PYPORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	georg@graf.priv.at
-COMMENT=	Python interface to sendmail-8.1x milter API
+COMMENT=	Python interface to Sendmail milter API
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 .if !exists(/usr/lib/libmilter.so)
-LIB_DEPENDS=	milter.2:${PORTSDIR}/mail/sendmail
+LIB_DEPENDS=	milter:${PORTSDIR}/mail/sendmail
 .endif
 
+PYPORTNAME=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX:C/[0-9]+-//}${PORTNAME}
+
 DIST_SUBDIR=	python
-USE_PYTHON=	2.5-2.9
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
+USE_PYTHON=	2.6-2.9
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	${PYPORTNAME}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/mail/py-milter/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/py-milter/distinfo	Tue Aug 14 10:09:49 2012	(r302513)
+++ head/mail/py-milter/distinfo	Tue Aug 14 10:18:07 2012	(r302514)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (python/milter-0.8.7.tar.gz) = 6ee85ef95533945045444b7d318b443adec74f3965e6297f58a7979ef25663b5
-SIZE (python/milter-0.8.7.tar.gz) = 180433
+SHA256 (python/pymilter-0.9.5.tar.gz) = 7bb478a4f9512e1dfe77c658f0410d62d9af91cedc35ee7aaaff6bc9a56d7f85
+SIZE (python/pymilter-0.9.5.tar.gz) = 117786

Modified: head/mail/py-milter/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/py-milter/pkg-descr	Tue Aug 14 10:09:49 2012	(r302513)
+++ head/mail/py-milter/pkg-descr	Tue Aug 14 10:18:07 2012	(r302514)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-This is a python extension module to enable python scripts to
-attach to sendmail's libmilter functionality.  Additional python
-modules provide for navigating and modifying MIME parts.
+This is a python extension module to enable python scripts to attach to
+sendmail's libmilter functionality. Additional python modules provide for
+navigating and modifying MIME parts, and sending DSNs or doing CBVs. 
 
 WWW: http://www.bmsi.com/python/milter.html
